strings.auth.login.hero: Coordinating baby care, one memo at a time.

strings.auth.login.errorMissing: Please enter your email and password
strings.onboarding.goalQuestion.title: What do you need help with first?
strings.onboarding.goalQuestion.subtitle: Pick the care rhythm that matters most right now.
strings.onboarding.goalQuestion.option.sync.labe: Stay in sync with my partner
strings.onboarding.goalQuestion.option.moments.d: Keep tiny memories on this device.
strings.onboarding.goalQuestion.option.household: Parents and caregivers share one view.
strings.onboarding.goalQuestion.reassurance.body: We will use this to shape your preview and keep setup focused.
strings.onboarding.painPoints.title: What feels hardest right now?
strings.onboarding.painPoints.subtitle: Choose anything that sounds familiar. This helps us shape your first handoff preview.
strings.onboarding.painPoints.option.missedHando: Feeds, diapers, sleep, and notes get fuzzy fast.
strings.onboarding.painPoints.option.partnerUpda: Texts and memory are easy to miss.
strings.onboarding.painPoints.option.overnightCo: Who fed the baby at 3 AM?
strings.onboarding.painPoints.option.scatteredNo: Paper, texts, and tired memory do not sync.
strings.onboarding.painPoints.option.photoMoment: Tiny memories should be easy to find, locally.

strings.reminders.notifications.title: Notifications
strings.reminders.notifications.demo: Notifications are local on this device for the demo build.
strings.reminders.notifications.enabledMessage: Reminder notifications are enabled on this device.
strings.reminders.notifications.offMessage: Notifications are off. Reminders still stay visible in BabyMinimo.
strings.reminders.notifications.savedNoPermissio: Reminder saved. Notifications are not enabled on this device.
strings.reminders.empty.title: No reminders yet
strings.reminders.empty.copy: Add a nudge for feeds, medicine, tummy time, or anything your household needs to remember.

strings.widgets.title: Widgets
strings.widgets.show.title: Show baby status widgets
strings.widgets.show.subtitle: Updates this device's Home Screen widget.
strings.widgets.status.default: Widgets update from this device when BabyMinimo refreshes Home.
strings.widgets.status.cleared: Widget snapshot cleared on this device.
strings.widgets.status.off: Widgets are off. No baby care snapshot is shown.
strings.widgets.status.on: Widgets will update again from Home after the next refresh.
strings.widgets.visible.title: Visible on this device
strings.widgets.visible.subtitle: Anyone who can see the widget can see this glanceable care state.
strings.widgets.clear.title: Clear widget snapshot
strings.widgets.clear.subtitle: Blanks the widget until BabyMinimo writes a fresh local snapshot.
strings.account.title: Profile & Account
strings.account.passwordDeferred: Password changes are deferred to production account security.
strings.lifecycle.cleanup.blocked: Local account cleanup could not finish. Please try again.
strings.lifecycle.cleanup.retry: Some local cleanup will be retried the next time BabyMinimo opens.
